title: Right Emotions, Bright Future: Mohaniya Karma
description: A profound video discourse explaining why Mohniye Karma is the 'King of all Karmas' and how our emotions lay the blueprint for our future. It perfectly complements the 'Khichdi Saga' by addressing the continuous cycle of anger and delusion.

title: Karma Theory and the 8 Types of Karma
description: A comprehensive foundational article breaking down the mechanics of the 8 karmas. It specifically details how Mohaniya (Deluding) Karma distorts our perception, causing us to identify with our ego and worldly connections rather than our true nature.

title: The Anatomy of Kashayas (Passions)
description: An in-depth reading on the sub-types of Mohaniya Karma, explaining how subtle deceit (Maaya), pride (Maan), greed (Lobh), and anger (Krodh) hijack the soul. This is essential for understanding the hidden triggers you must observe during the 'Pause'.

title: Understanding Darshan and Charitra Mohaniya
description: A detailed lecture breaking down how Mohniye Karma is split into perception-deluding and conduct-deluding natures. This directly relates to why we feel trapped in a 'sunken cost fallacy' and lose our rational options at runtime.
